scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.dev:debug: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron --inspect=9229 --remote-debugging-port=9222 ."
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.dev:electron:debug: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron --inspect=9229 --remote-debugging-port=9222 .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && electron-builder
